explanations.conciseVerdict: Likely exoplanet: repeated dips recur at stable intervals.
beginnerBullets: Check whether dips repeat with similar spacing.
Compare dip depth consistency across events.
Use folded view to verify coherent transit shape.
explanations.deepDive: Signal periodicity and folded coherence support a transit interpretation.
explanations.commonPitfall: Overweighting one deep dip instead of periodic consistency.

explanations.conciseVerdict: Unlikely exoplanet: timing and dip shape are too inconsistent.
beginnerBullets: Dips fail to repeat cleanly at one period.
Depth and shape vary too much between events.
explanations.deepDive: Weak periodic coherence and high noise indicate likely false positive behavior.
explanations.commonPitfall: Overweighting one deep dip instead of periodic consistency.
